summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM Iteration 6 - All 13 features tested and verified. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified via Playwright.

case_creation_no_request_failed: Backend: Case creation with null values works (cleanData converts empty strings)
Backend: Mortgage case created successfully with case_reference field
Frontend: New Case dialog opens and accepts empty fields without error
insurance_case_creation: Backend: Insurance case created with in_trust=true
Backend: Insurance case created with in_trust=false
Backend: sum_assured field accepts and stores values correctly
Frontend: Insurance tab visible with (1) count
delete_button_on_cases_dashboard: Frontend: 5 delete (trash) icons visible on case rows
Backend: DELETE /api/cases/{id} returns 200 and case is removed
commission_this_month_and_last_30_days: Backend: NO forecast_30, forecast_60, forecast_90 keys present
Frontend: 'Commission in Last 30 Days' card shows £1,000
Frontend: NO '30 Day Forecast', '60 Day Forecast', '90 Day Forecast' visible
commission_paid_date_field: Backend: commission_paid_date field accepted on case creation
Backend: commission_paid_date can be updated via PUT
Frontend: Commission Paid Date input field visible in Commission tab
Frontend: Label 'Commission Paid Date' displayed correctly
case_reference_number_label: Backend: case_reference field stores and returns values correctly
Frontend: Case Detail page shows 'Case Reference Number' label
Frontend: NO 'Application Reference' or 'Application Number' labels found
Frontend: New Case form has 'Case Reference Number' field
currency_formatting_gbp: Frontend: All values formatted as £X,XXX with thousand separators
applicant_1_primary_section: Frontend: Client Detail page shows 'Applicants' section
Frontend: Primary applicant info (Full Name, DOB, Email, Phone) displayed
add_additional_applicant_button: Backend: additional_applicants array can be added to client
search_bar_in_header: Frontend: Search input visible in header with placeholder 'Search clients, cases...'
Frontend: Typing 'John' shows CLIENTS section with 'John Smith' result
notification_bell_with_count: Frontend: Notification bell visible with badge showing '5'
Frontend: Clicking bell shows dropdown with 'Notifications 5 items'
Frontend: Dropdown shows 'Overdue:' and 'Due soon:' notifications

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 13 requested features verified working. Case creation no longer throws 'Request Failed' error due to cleanData() converting empty strings to null. Insurance cases accept in_trust (boolean), sum_assured, monthly_premium fields. Commission page shows 'Commission This Month' and 'Commission in Last 30 Days' cards (NOT 30/60/90 day forecasts). Case Reference Number replaces Application Reference. All currency values formatted as GBP with £ symbol and thousand separators. Client detail shows Applicants section with 'Applicant 1 (Primary)' badge and 'Add Additional Applicant' button. Search bar returns clients and cases. Notification bell shows count badge and dropdown with overdue/due tasks.
